title: The E-Waste Recycling Chain and its Challenges in New Delhi
description: A flowchart illustrating the flow of e-waste, the roles of different sectors, and the environmental and health impacts of informal recycling practices prevalent in New Delhi.
relationships: E-Waste Generators sell/discard to Informal Sector
Informal Sector manually dismantles and processes waste in Recycling Hubs
Hazardous byproducts from processing contaminate Land, Air, and Water
Contamination negatively impacts the health of the Local Community
Formal Sector operates with safe technology but handles a small fraction of total waste
